creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Are you seeing any errors  in the auth.log or messages?  You may need 
to rebuild OpenPAM with debugging. 

To do that, add -DOPENPAM_DEBUG to the CFLAGS in 
/usr/src/lib/libpam/libpam/Makefile.  Then rebuild and reinstall libpam.
